description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, armored exoskeleton with a predominantly orange and gold color scheme, accented by green and black details. The robot's upper body is heavily armored, with large, rounded shoulder pads and a prominent, metallic cannon integrated into its right arm. Its helmet is streamlined with a green-tinted visor, giving it a futuristic and combat-ready appearance. The legs and arms are segmented with visible joint mechanisms, suggesting high mobility and strength. The back of the robot displays additional armor plating and mechanical details, while the overall form is athletic and human-like. The design is reminiscent of advanced combat or exploration robots, with a focus on durability and versatility in urban environments.
description: A heavily armored, orange and gold humanoid robot with a large arm cannon, green visor, and athletic build. Its design emphasizes strength, mobility, and futuristic technology.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green visor, chest armor, and large arm cannon raised on the right arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the arm cannon's length, segmented armor, and the profile of the helmet and shoulder pad.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back armor plating, mechanical details, and the symmetrical design of the legs and shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the smooth, rounded shoulder pad, arm cannon, and the streamlined leg armor.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with legs slightly apart, left arm bent and resting on the hip, right arm raised forward with the cannon aimed outward, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No separate clothing; the robot is covered in integrated, form-fitting armor panels with a metallic and polymer finish, featuring decorative colored accents.
attribute_facial_features: The face is covered by a smooth, helmet-like structure with a single, wide green visor; no visible mouth, nose, or expressive features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible joints, including ball and hinge types at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, allowing for a wide range of motion; hands and feet are armored and appear to have articulated fingers and toes.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: A large green visor on the helmet likely serves as a visual sensor; no other sensors are visibly apparent.
